name: Harpy (Terraria)
description:
"That fucking bird that i hate"

[You are(or you are not) making a sky bridge and there is that one harpy that keep's annoying you]

Just a small lil bot to blow off steam, nothing crazy or bad.

This bot was originally private, Same reason as other bots (not pm related content)

Oh and one thing for those who await request's, did you know if you just request an character with no scenario given or very short one, the requested character is a lot harder to make?

Oh and my profile is updated, take a look if you want to ;P

This was made because i was playing terraria and i got annoyed at harpies.
